entry.title: Bank Integration through API
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are in process of API based Bank Integration where the data will be sent in a JASON file using CPI. We are not clear on:

1. What config we need to do in our system?

2. What program we need to maintain under FBZP> Payment method in Country > Use Classic payment medium programs (RFFO*)

Any other thing we need to consider?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: UI5 Building Blocks: How to enable global variant management?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using sap.fe.macros.Table in a freestyle app (not within the FLP) and have set the parameter variantManagement = "Control". I can save variants locally but not globally so that they are available to other users. I assume this requires creating a database table and implementing specific event handlers. However, I haven't found any relevant events in the API documentation.

The API documentation for sap.fe.macros.Table mentions: "If set with value Control, a variant management control is displayed within the table, and the table is linked to it." How can I access this control to attach the necessary event handlers? Is there any sample code available for this?

entry.title: Extending Fiori Elements App Deployed on SAP BTP using Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to create an adaptation project to extend a Fiori Elements app deployed on SAP BTP CF. However, I'm facing issues with selecting the system during the creation process. 

I'm referring to the official SAP documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/adaptation-project-on-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US  but unfortunately, couldn't get it to work.
 
I have successfully created an adaptation project with the app deployed in ABAP, but I'm stuck with extending an app deployed in BTP. Could someone please guide me on how to configure the system (BTP) in the adaptation project? Specifically:

1. Do I need to create a destination to select the BTP Subaccount?
 
2. If yes, how do I create the destination for CF Subaccount?

Any help or resources on this topic would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: MACRS Depreciation incorrect value
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

Configuration Steps: Tax Depreciation method "MACRS"

I have created the new Dep. key with below :

0014, 001, 001,U05

U05 Multilevel method as per below :

9999 1 0 01 20.0000 0.0000
9999 2 0 01 32.0000 0.0000
9999 3 0 01 19.2000 0.0000
9999 4 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 5 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 99 0 01 5.7600 0.0000

It is working when the Ordinary Dep. start is 1st Apr.

I get the exact results , if my ODep start date is other than year beginning my Dep. rates are incorrect.

i am using , Apr~Mar Fiscal year.

Ex: If my O.Dep start is 1st Oct , system is calculating 20% from Oct ~ Mar 2nd year system is calulating 20% for 6 months & another 6 months with 32%.

I am expecting system should calulate 32% for all 12 months.

Thanks
Santhosh

entry.title: RAP validation works in Preview but not in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hello,

Newbie in RAP. I have created a demo app in a sandbox environment.

There is a very basic validation implemented where a field (Office Space) must start with "FL". This works perfectly well when using the "Preview" functionality from Eclipse. The error message appears and the field is highlighted.

However, after creating a List Report with the standard template from Visual Studio Code, only the generic error appears, not the one related to the field.

Below you can find the definition and implementation:

To be noted that if I remove the %state_area value, the error appears in a popup but the field is still not highlighted.

Without %state_area:

So maybe I misuse the %state_area? I have just used a dummy text "OFFICE_SPACE". Should the values for this field be predefined somewhere?

entry.title: Calling Analytics UI API from SAPUI5 Application on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are currently facing a roadblock while implementing the following scenario:

Scenario:
We are working with SAPUI5 applications running on a Cloud Foundry runtime. Our objective is to call the Analytics UI API exposed by CALM from an application UI service hosted outside the CALM tenant.

Setup Details:
-Trust has been successfully established between the subaccount and the Identity Tenant Service.
-A destination using OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion has been configured in the subaccount hosting the SAPUI5 application.
-Additionally, a trust destination has been set up in the environment.
Issue:
Despite these configurations, when I click the link to access my application on the BTP, I receive a 503 Service Unavailable error when attempting to consume the destination in the SAPUI5 application.

 

Shared Configuration Files:
The mta.yaml configuration (attached screenshot).

 


The xs-app.json configuration (attached screenshot).

 


Could you kindly provide guidance on how to resolve this issue? Are there any additional configurations or steps we might have missed?

Looking forward to your timely support and expert input

entry.title: SAPUI5: Consume destination during local development]
entry.content:
Fellow friends, i'm having trouble using my sapui5 app with a destination while working locally.
When deployed, the app works perfectly, but when i'm in development mode on vscode i have a cors error and can't get to access the data.
Basically, it is a simple destination pointing to a NorthWind oData api, no credentials are needed. So, why am i getting this error?
I have worked in an app that could access the destination locally by setting the full url in the .yml file, but it does not work when i do the same in my app.
Could anyone help me get through this problem?

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/CAP Application
entry.content:
I have IAS (Identity Authentication Service) configured for my application. Currently, I am using the /user-api/currentUser API to fetch user information. While this allows me to retrieve basic details about the logged-in user, I am unable to read the roles and groups assigned to the user in IAS.

I need guidance on how to properly fetch roles and group information from IAS within my UI5/CAP application. Are there additional APIs, configurations, or specific steps required to achieve this functionality? Your help in resolving this issue is appreciated.

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model   SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  SAPUI5

entry.title: SAPUI5 auto refresh binding
entry.content:
Is there any possible way  to check if value  is changing other than using interval?

 

 
            this._intervalId = setInterval(function () {

            var sPath1= `/SalesOrderManage('${sSalesOrderID1}')/SalesOrderType`;
 
             }, 2500); // 5000 milliseconds = 5 seconds
           
        },
code is just small preview but i get data like this  oModel.bindContext(sPath1).requestObject() and i have to refresh the value of data, but i wanna know is there any possible way to get it without interval?

entry.title: Increase "page size" or growing threshold in a responsive table
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Since "select all" checkbox was removed (3233426 - 'Select All' checkbox missing on S/4HANA Applications UI from SAP UI5 Version 1.97 to 1.120) selecting large number of items in Manage Billing Documents app is very cumbersome, the workaround of selecting the first element, press shift and select last element only works once all the elements have been displayed. To do that the user needs to press MORE, time after time until all values are displayed

Is there any way to load all elements at once to select all of them faster? Like adding a parameter to the url or setting growingThreshold through the browser dev tools...

 

Thanks in advance,

Best regards,

entry.title: Consume protected destinations during development
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while developing my SAPUI5 app because I am unable to access the destinations during development mode.

I know there is a plugin that allows running BAS in VS Code, but even after using it, I am still unable to connect to the destination.

So, my question is: What needs to be done to set up a development environment that retrieves real data from the destinations configured for the SAPUI5 app?

entry.title: How to properly hide a custom column in a Fiori Elements app with OData V4?
entry.content:
Dear Fiori experts, I hope you can help me with the problem I'm facing.

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using Flexible Programming Model that we're trying to have as much metadata-driven as possible. OData interface is V4. One of my tasks is to implement a custom column with quite sophisticated set of microchartbars, therefore, I'm doing it on frontend by using CDS as my source of data. No problems so far, I've implemented this custom column in my manifest and custom xml template:

My problem is that its availability has to be dependent of another criterion, such as whether or not a user has some particular authorization. This authorization check is done on backend via custom entity and is exposed as an entity set in my OData V4 service, which I read in the onInit method in my List Page controller extension. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to hide this custom column completely if authority check fails. My best bet so far was to use .setIgnoredFields method in .onBeforeRendering method in my List Page controller extension, but for some reason setIgnoredFields works only with columns that come from backend (Plant, Material, etc.), but it totally ignores if I put there my custom column name, no matter what. In the below example it will hide Plant column entirely, but leaves ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn column.

I tried "ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", "DataField::

ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", etc. - no effect. What am I doing wrong and how to do it properly?

I also tried to use all sorts of expression bindings for "availability" in the manifest, but it seems this property is immune to it...

I appreciate every bit of help.

entry.title: How to customize, enhance or edit the Standard Fiori App?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm new to the Fiori Launchpad.

I recently learned how to set up catalogs, target mappings, groups, and roles in PFCG, and how to display tiles to users on the Launchpad.

Now, I want to customize or enhance the UI of a standard Fiori app, such as adding buttons, changing the style of buttons using CSS and etc. How can I do this? How can I access the source code of the app? I can customize my created custom applications in the repository browser -> BSP Application, but I’m unable to do so with standard Fiori apps, such as Fiori app ID F1705.

entry.title: Q : How to notify to user when invoices are not fully cleared in F110 (Payment run)
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding an issue similar to the one described in the below-mentioned SAP Notes.
3318007 - Error VF 348 in F110 - SAP for Me
I referred to SAP Note 3318007 and made the suggested changes, but there were no visible effects after implementing them.

In F110, when the user execute the Payment Run, it shows a green status with the message "Payment run has been carried out." However, I found that not all invoices are actually cleared.

Is there a way to modify the message to display a warning or error in such cases, using BTE, BAdI, or Enhancement?

It is important for users to know that the target invoices have been fully cleared.
Please let me know if there is an effective way to solve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: GitHub announcement invalid links to release notes
entry.content:
Whenever a new release is published it contains links to:

---

Documentation

In the OpenUI5 SDK, you can find a summary of what’s new in this release:
https://sdk.openui5.org/1.132.0/#/topic/99ac68a5b1c3416ab5c84c99fefa250d


Change log

https://sdk.openui5.org/1.132.0/#releasenotes.html

---

These link never work for me and it seems they never work for anyone. Can something be done to fix those to point to working release notes and summary instead.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Product Compliance - Manage Substance - Additional Identifiers
entry.content:
Hi guys,
in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 for Product Compliance in app "Manage Substance Compliance" there is the section additional identifiers.

As this is a demo system, I want to change the available identifers, but I do not find area to change them - neither in IMG nor in an app.

Searching the internet and SAP, the onyl hint I find is in "what's new in SAP S/4HANA 2023", here the information is given:
----------------
Before you can assign an additional identifier type, you must first create it in Customizing at SAP
Customizing Implementation Guide > Environment, Health and Safety > Foundation for
EHS > General Configuration > Specify Additional Company Substance Identifiers.
--------------
But this is not available in IMG 2408...

Any suggestions are appreciated.


Thanks
Harry

entry.title: No data being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service
entry.content:
Hi,

I've created a new workspace and a new project within the workspace.

But, no data is being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service.

Can you please help?

entry.title: Not able to connect to system while creating a project from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a new project template --> SAP Fiori generator--> Custom page which use the fiori elements.

when i try to connect to a system to get the odata services getting the below error.

 

When i check the same destination using my id in BTP the connection is successufl.

 

Please suggest what else i need to check ?

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Recently we have activated FIORI in our sandbox system, we have activated service in SICF as well. 

When we are testing the service via SICF application is working but when we open the app from launchpad then we are getting Error message as below. Please note same application is working fine in other system.

In devtools there are so many errors I have found

Let me know if any notes need to apply or any configuration missed.

Advance thanks for your help.

Regards,

Nutan

entry.title: sorter component shows an error message
entry.content: In version 1.131.1, the sorter component shows an error message. The message says that the value of vSorterInfo is not defined. After defining it, an error is displayed on the page.
